```markdown
---
title: "Fermentation KPI Analysis"
author: "Ioannis"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
data <- read_csv("../../data/simulated_fermentation_data.csv")
```

## Overview
This report summarizes key fermentation KPIs and visualizes process trends using simulated data.

## KPI Summary
```{r}
data %>%
  summarise(
    max_biomass = max(biomass_gL),
    min_glucose = min(glucose_gL),
    avg_do = mean(do_pct),
    final_pH = last(ph)
  )
```

## Biomass Growth
```{r, echo=FALSE}
ggplot(data, aes(time_hr, biomass_gL)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", size = 1.2) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Glucose Consumption
```{r, echo=FALSE}
ggplot(data, aes(time_hr, glucose_gL)) +
  geom_line(color = "firebrick", size = 1.2) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## DO Profile
```{r, echo=FALSE}
ggplot(data, aes(time_hr, do_pct)) +
  geom_line(color = "darkgreen", size = 1.2) +
  theme_minimal()
```
```
